_comment: Alignment-based behavior for fight/harvest/empower. Keys match EPlanetoidAlignment (HomeWorldPlanetoidTypes.h). Per docs/PLANETOID_BIOMES.md §3 and §3.1. Code branches on GameMode GetCurrentZoneAlignment().

Corrupted.empower_rule: conversion: strip sin, convert foes to loved version (vendors, helpers, quest givers)

Neutral.harvest_rule: full (trees, herbs, rocks, water per biome)
